description: A production needs to hire a freelance video editor for a short-term project.

nodes.task_description: Search a database of pre-approved freelancers for video editors with experience in the relevant genre.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds five suitable freelance editors.

nodes.task_description: Check the availability of the shortlisted editors for the project dates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms two of the five editors are available.

nodes.task_description: Send a contract offer to the selected editor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates and sends a standard freelance contract.
